name: @intutic/proxy
description: Native high-performance AI agent governance proxy binary

scripts.build: cargo build --release && mkdir -p bin && (cp target/release/intutic-proxy bin/ 2>/dev/null || cp ../../target/release/intutic-proxy bin/)
scripts.prepublishOnly: cargo build --release && mkdir -p bin && (cp target/release/intutic-proxy bin/ 2>/dev/null || cp ../../target/release/intutic-proxy bin/)
